pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly start and verify YDBGui on port 8089.
VistA Outpatient Pharmacy documentation and setup script database queries confirm File #52 is stored in the ^PSRX global.
VistA FileMan documentation and setup script confirm that node 1 under ^PSRX(IEN) corresponds to the REFILL subfile.
verifier.py docstring and logic specify these exact scoring constants, although the file is truncated/corrupted and will fail during execution.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated VA patient data within the worldvista/vehu Docker container. VistA documentation and task setup queries confirm that the Outpatient Pharmacy Prescription file (File #52) is stored in the ^PSRX global, and that the REFILL subfile is correctly located at node 1. The scoring weights match the intended logic documented in verifier.py, though the file itself is truncated.
